title: It + V + that + S + V（虛主詞 + 名詞子句）

formulas.zh: 虛主詞 + 連綴動詞 + that 子句；真正主詞和動詞置於 that 子句中

formulas.formula: It + is + said/known/believed/reported + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 虛主詞 + 被動句型 + that 子句；表示傳聞、已知或推測

explanation: 此句型使用虛主詞 it，將真正的主詞子句（that 子句）後移，使句子結構更自然流暢。常見於被動語態表達，如 "It is said that..."、"It is known that..." 等，用以表達傳聞、推測、已知事實或報導。虛主詞 it 本身無實義，只是句子結構上的需要。該句型與 "That + S + V + is + adj." 意義相同，但前者較為正式、中立。

examples.eng: It is said that he will arrive in Taiwan next week.
examples.chi: 據說他下週將抵達台灣。

examples.eng: It appears that the company is facing serious financial difficulties.
examples.chi: 看起來該公司正面臨嚴重的財務困難。

examples.eng: It is believed that climate change will have significant impacts on agriculture.
examples.chi: 人們普遍認為氣候變遷將對農業產生重大影響。

examples.eng: It seems that most students prefer online learning to traditional classes.
examples.chi: 看起來大多數學生更喜歡線上學習而不是傳統課堂。

extension.tip: 虛主詞 it 必須使用，不可省略或改為其他代詞。該句型多用於正式、學術或新聞文體。注意："It is + adj. + that..." 結構中的形容詞必須能搭配 that 子句，不是所有形容詞都適用。

examples.test: It is said that she won the award. vs. She is said to have won the award.
examples.result: → 前者使用 that 子句，後者使用不定式，兩者意義相同但結構不同；學測常考兩種變體互換

examples.test: ❌ That she will come is certain. vs. ✓ It is certain that she will come.
examples.result: → 後者因使用虛主詞而更自然，是更常見的表達方式

extension.note: 記住：虛主詞 it 開頭 + 連綴動詞/被動動詞 + that + 完整子句，這是正式書寫的標準模式。

parts: that the government will announce the new policy tomorrow.
exercises.sentence: It is expected that the government will announce the new policy tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 預期政府將於明天公布新政策。

parts: that plastic pollution is affecting marine ecosystems globally.
exercises.sentence: It is known that plastic pollution is affecting marine ecosystems globally.
exercises.translation: 眾所周知，塑膠污染正在全球影響海洋生態系統。

parts: that renewable energy will become the main power source in the future.
exercises.sentence: It seems that renewable energy will become the main power source in the future.
exercises.translation: 看起來再生能源將成為未來的主要電力來源。

parts: that this novel has been translated into over fifty languages.
exercises.sentence: It is reported that this novel has been translated into over fifty languages.
exercises.translation: 據報導，這部小說已被翻譯成五十多種語言。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的虛主詞句型，表達一個眾所周知的事實。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ is known that the Earth revolves around the Sun.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（It）。此句型使用虛主詞 it，將真正主詞的 that 子句後移。"It is known that..." 是標準被動語態的虛主詞句型。選項 B（That）若置於句首需搭配 be 動詞形成 "That...is known"，但題目已有 is，文法錯誤。選項 C（This）和 D（What）都無法與此結構搭配。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的動詞，完成虛主詞句型表達推測。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It _______ that the new product will be launched next month.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（is believed）。虛主詞句型需使用被動語態 "It + is + 過去分詞 + that..."，表達傳聞或推測。"is believed that..." 意為「據信...」。選項 B（believes）主動語態在此結構不適用。選項 C（is believing）時態錯誤，該句不用進行式。選項 D（believed）缺少 is，文法不完整。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的詞彙與時態，完成虛主詞句型表達報導。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is reported that the famous actress _______ in a luxury car accident last night.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（was involved）。由於主句時態是現在式（is reported），而 "last night" 表過去特定時間，that 子句應用過去時態。"was involved in..." 表達「捲入...」的被動事件。選項 B（has been involved）強調持續影響，但 "last night" 特指過去時刻，不適用完成式。選項 C 和 D 為主動語態，與虛主詞被動句型的表達習慣不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別虛主詞句型與直接主語句型的差異，選擇最正式表達。
mc_exercises.question_eng: In the official report, _______ it appears that the company has concealed significant financial irregularities for several years.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（It appears that the company）。虛主詞句型 "It appears that..." 較直接用 "The company appears to..." 更形式正式、中立，適合官方報告語境。此句型強調說話人的客觀推測。選項 B 語序錯誤，"that" 不應在句首。選項 C 雖文法正確，但不如虛主詞句型正式有力。選項 D（appearing）非動詞用法，文法錯誤。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 據說明年會有新的大學入學制度。
translation_exercises.answer: It is said that there will be a new university admission system next year.
key_points: 虛主詞 it 無實義
hints: 提示1：使用『It is said that + S + V』結構，將子句後移
提示2：注意時態與被動語態搭配，『said』表傳聞，不需加『by whom』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 人們普遍認為運動對身體健康很重要。
translation_exercises.answer: It is believed that exercise is very important for physical health.
key_points: 形容詞 important 搭配介詞 for
hints: 提示1：『believed』為被動語態，表示普遍看法或共識
提示2：主詞 exercise 為單數，動詞用 is；避免誤用『It is believed that people think...』的重複結構

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 眾所周知，充足的睡眠對學生的學業表現有很大的影響。
translation_exercises.answer: It is well known that adequate sleep has a significant impact on students' academic performance.
key_points: adequate sleep / has a significant impact on
hints: 提示1：『well known』強調眾所周知的事實，『well』修飾 known；整個結構為『It + is + well known + that + S + V』
提示2：注意『impact on』為固定搭配；『academic performance』為關鍵詞；避免用『It is known that people know...』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 據報導，長時間使用社群媒體可能會導致青少年的心理健康問題，但這一點仍有許多人質疑。
translation_exercises.answer: It is reported that prolonged use of social media may lead to mental health problems in adolescents, though this remains questioned by many.
key_points: 虛主詞句型搭配轉折子句
hints: 提示1：『reported』表示新聞報導；『prolonged』修飾 use；『may lead to』表推測性因果；後半句用『though』引導轉折
提示2：避免誤用『It is reported that people report...』；注意『in adolescents』說明受影響者；『questioned by many』為被動結構，表示異議
